violations.text: (Fried chicken) was observed held at (109) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to 165 or above Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

(Walk in cooler) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair.Observed ambient temperatures at 45DF.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was ( 0 ) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm.Per PIC, technician is expected end of day 8/20/25. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

(Dairy products ) was observed held at (49-50 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink and dishwasher ). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Faucet handle on hansink is in poor repair. Observed a leak. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
The (ceilings ) in the (back hallway area ) area is in poor repair.Observed water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Raw animal foods (such as raw chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated chicken. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 10 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC to use 3 bay sink to sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris: - ice machine (ice disposed) - can opener The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Rice was observed held at 123 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Various items were observed held between 45-70 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC either moved items or discarded based on time/temp. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Various items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Fish was observed thawing in a sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: - under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); - completely submerged under running water; - as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. PIC placed in walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the party hall, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Various items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The following was not in good repair:- prep unit- walk-in cooler- dish machine New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Cardboard and paper bags are used in the construction of shelf liners in the kitchen/back hall area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine and 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:- prep units- table under flat top grill- sides of cooking equipment- shelves Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
Inspector observed large piles of wood and debris around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
The ceiling tiles in the back hallway area is in poor repair (previous water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC started cleaning during inspection, Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep table shelves, food storage racks(WIC), and cookline prep unit gaskets) have an accumulation dirt, debris, and/or rust. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025
Hot water knob at faucet on handsink (kitchen) in poor repair. Observed a leak. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed ,rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025
Inspector observed dead mouse on trap.PIC removed from premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025

Wood is used in the construction of (bar and walls ) in the (bar area ) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces of the have an accumulation of debris: 1.prep table shelves 2.prpe unit drawers 3.prep units 4.shelves and doors in walk in cooler 5.chest freezer hood New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025
The (ceiling tiles ) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. Missing tiles and water stains. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025
The floors in kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The (walls ) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed missing/and or damaged dry wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025
